# Templates (Copy/Paste)

Use the `Usage Mode` column to decide whether a template can be sent directly to a customer, used live in a workshop, or kept as an internal working artifact.

| Template | Usage Mode | Primary user | Practical purpose |
|---|---|---|---|
| [Initial discovery intake form](initial-discovery-intake-form/) | Customer-facing | Sales / Account Executive | Gather basic context before the first discovery call |
| [Sales discovery call script](sales-discovery/) | Facilitator-led | Sales / Account Executive | Run the first serious discovery conversation |
| [Discovery Summary v0](discovery-summary/) | Internal working doc | Sales / Account Executive | Capture what was heard and confirm the next step |
| [Commercial boundary talk track](commercial-boundary/) | Facilitator-led | Sales / Account Executive | Explain when discovery stays free vs becomes paid |
| [Decision log + open questions + risk register](decision-log-risk-register/) | Internal working doc | Current phase lead | Track decisions, unknowns, and risks across phases |
| [Workflow workshop pack](workflow-workshop/) | Facilitator-led | Product Manager / Delivery Lead | Turn features into workflows and MVP slices |
| [Technical deep dive + NFR scenarios](technical-deep-dive/) | Facilitator-led | Solutions Architect | Validate integrations, constraints, and measurable NFRs |
| [Security/procurement evidence pack](security-evidence-pack/) | Internal working doc | Security / Compliance / GRC | Manage evidence, questionnaires, and blockers |
| [PoV plan](pov-plan/) | Collaborative working doc | Product Manager / Delivery Lead + Engineering + SA | Scope and control a timeboxed PoV |
| [Handover packet + backlog format](handover-packet/) | Internal working doc | Product Manager / Delivery Lead | Consolidate discovery into delivery-ready artifacts |
